title: New Data at Cure SMA Highlight Potential Benefit of SPINRAZA® (nusinersen) in Infants and Toddlers with Unmet Clinical Needs After Gene Therapy
text: CAMBRIDGE, Mass., June 30, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Biogen Inc. (Nasdaq: BIIB) announced new SPINRAZA® (nusinersen) data aimed at answering critical questions for the spinal muscular atrophy (SMA) community. The data were presented at the SMA Research & Clinical Care Meeting hosted by Cure SMA this week in Orlando, Fla.

title: Is This a Sign That Biogen's Leqembi Could Obtain FDA Approval Next Month?
text: The FDA could soon make a decision on Biogen's Alzheimer's drug, Leqembi. An advisory committee confirmed its clinical benefits, suggesting an approval could be ahead.

title: Does This Signal Trouble for Biogen's New Alzheimer's Drug?
text: Some European Alzheimer's experts are wary about the future of Biogen's drug Leqembi in the region. Regulators in Europe, the U.S., and Japan currently are reviewing the drug.

title: 2 Market-Beating Stocks With Major Catalysts on the Way
text: Vertex's next blockbuster could generate billions of dollars in sales. Biogen is inching closer to a goal it's been working on for a long time.

title: 7 Undervalued S&P 500 Stocks to Buy in June
text: When attempting to build a portfolio of reliable entities, you probably can't go wrong with undervalued S&P 500 stocks. Featuring the market performance of 500 of the largest companies listed on stock exchanges in the U.S., you're dealing with proven winners.

title: What's Happening With Biogen Stock?
text: After a 13% rise in Biogen stock (NASDAQ: BIIB) this year, aligning with the broader S&P500 index returns, we believe it has little room for growth.

title: Markets Rise Midday as Inflation News Raises Expectations of a Rate Hike Pause
text: U.S. equities gained at midday on Tuesday, June 13, 2023 as lower inflation raised optimism the Fed could pause its rate hike cycle.

title: European Alzheimer's experts unconvinced by new Eisai, Biogen drug
text: Alzheimer's disease experts in Europe weighing potential use of a new drug from Eisai and Biogen say its ability to slow cognitive decline may not outweigh its health risks, or be worth the toll on scarce healthcare resources.

title: Biogen Announces Changes to Its Board of Directors
text: CAMBRIDGE, Mass., June 12, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Biogen Inc. (Nasdaq: BIIB) announced several changes to its Board of Directors today. The changes will refresh the composition of the Board and follow the Board's continual interaction with company stockholders to solicit their perspective on a range of issues around the company's performance and strategy.

title: BIIB Stock Alert: Biogen Resumes Trading With New FDA Backing
text: Biogen (NASDAQ: BIIB ) stock is a hot topic among traders on Monday as the company's share resumed trading following a halt that was in effect on Friday. With that halt coming to an end, investors in BIIB stock are also celebrating a new recommendation from the FDA.

title: Biogen (BIIB), Eisai Alzheimer Drug Gets FDA Panel Endorsement
text: An FDA advisory committee supports granting full approval to Biogen (BIIB)/Eisai's Alzheimer's disease antibody. NASDAQ halts BIIB's common stock trading on Jun 9.

title: Biogen shares rise on imminent approval of Alzheimer's drug following FDA panel vote
text: Biogen Inc (NASDAQ:BIIB) shares rose in pre-market trading on Monday after a Food and Drug Administration (FDA) panel voted in favor of Eisai and Biogen's drug LEQEMBI as a treatment for Alzheimer's disease, clearing the way for traditional approval of the drug. The FDA Peripheral and Central Nervous System Drugs Advisory Committee said on Friday that data from a global Phase 3 trial in Alzheimer's patients confirmed the clinical benefit of LEQEMBI in the disease, according to a statement from Biogen.

title: 5 Things to Know Before Markets Open
text: UBS completes its takeover of Credit Suisse and Biogen wins key FDA support for its Alzheimer's disease treatment. Here's what investors need to know today.

title: Biogen rises as FDA panel backs Alzheimer's drug, easing safety concerns
text: Shares of Biogen Inc rose 4% in premarket trade on Monday as an unanimous backing of the company's Alzheimer's drug Leqembi by the U.S. regulator's advisers eased concerns that a traditional approval for the treatment will not come with major new safety warnings.

title: Biogen stock climbs on drug approval recommendation, Oracle shares rise ahead of earnings, and other stocks on the move
text: Biogen Inc. shares BIIB, +1.31% rallied 5% following a full-day halt during the regular session as a Food and Drug Administration committee convened to vote on an approval recommendation for the biotech's Alzheimer's drug candidate it makes with Eisai Co. ESALF, +9.35% The committee voted unanimously to recommend approval, and Biogen shares took off when they were unhalted.

title: Biogen inches closer to FDA approval for its Alzheimer's drug
text: Shares of Biogen Inc (NASDAQ: BIIB) gained nearly 10% in extended hours after the biotech firm edged closer to winning FDA approval for its Alzheimer's drug. FDA panel greenlights Biogen's Leqembi Late on Friday, advisory committee of the U.S. Food and Drug Administration unanimously recommended Leqembi for the treatment of Alzheimer's disease.

title: Biogen stock rallies after full-day halt as FDA panel recommends Alzheimer's drug for approval
text: Biogen Inc. BIIB, +1.31% shares rallied in the extended session late Friday following a full-day halt after the biotech company received a recommendation from a Food and Drug Administration advisory committee to approve an Alzheimer's treatment it makes with Eisai Co. ESALF, +9.35% Biogen shares rallied as much as 9% after hours, after spending the regular session halted at $308.88.

title: FDA Advisory Committee Votes Unanimously to Confirm the Clinical Benefit of LEQEMBI® (lecanemab-irmb) for the Treatment of Alzheimer's Disease
text: Peripheral and Central Nervous System Drugs Advisory Committee voted based on data from large global confirmatory Phase 3 Clarity AD clinical trial in patients living with early Alzheimer's disease

title: Biogen Stock Halted As It Faces Make-Or-Break Moment For Alzheimer's Treatment
text: Biogen stock was halted Friday as a panel of experts to the FDA debated the merits of its Alzheimer's treatment, Leqembi.

title: FDA advisors to weigh whether Alzheimer's drug Leqembi should receive full approval
text: Medicare has promised to broadly cover Leqembi, which costs $26,500 per year, if the FDA grants full approval of the treatment.

title: FDA panel to debate US approval for Alzheimer's drug from Eisai and Biogen
text: A panel of experts on Friday will discuss whether to recommend traditional U.S. regulatory approval for Eisai and Biogen's new Alzheimer's drug Leqembi, a move expected to expand Medicare payment for the treatment.

title: Biogen (BIIB), Eisai's Alzheimer Drug Likely to Get Full FDA Nod
text: Based on briefing documents issued by the FDA, a full regulatory approval is expected on Biogen (BIIB)/Eisai's Alzheimer's disease antibody. The final decision is expected in the early next month.

title: Mastering the Double-Bottom Pattern (Unveiling 3 Intriguing Setups in Today's Market)
text: A double-bottom base is a chart pattern commonly used in technical analysis to identify a solid reward-to-risk zone in a stock. Stock Strategist Andrew Rocco walks you through the pattern and unveils 3 juicy setups.

title: Biogen (BIIB) to End One of Two Parkinson's Studies on BIIB122
text: Biogen BIIB announced that it is discontinuing one of the two studies on its and partner Denali Therapeutics' DNLI small molecule LRRK2 inhibitor, BIIB122, for Parkinson's disease.

title: Medicare unveils plan for coverage of new Alzheimer's drugs
text: Medicare on Thursday announced plans for coverage of new Alzheimer's drugs whose accessibility has become a point of controversy.

title: Biogen Hits Buy Zone On A Fresh Win In Alzheimer's Disease; Eli Lilly, Eisai Shares Jump
text: Biogen stock jumped into a buy zone Thursday after Medicare officials said they would pay for some Alzheimer's treatments.
